objective: Reproduce and fix the elastic/beats kafka input Test() panic on client initialization failure in a disposable VM

setup.name: add repro test
setup.commit_message: test: add kafka input panic repro

patches.name: return client initialization error instead of panicking
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('filebeat/input/kafka/input.go')
s = p.read_text()
old = '''func (input *kafkaInput) Test(ctx input.TestContext) error {
	client, err := sarama.NewClient(input.config.Hosts, input.saramaConfig)
	if err != nil {
		ctx.Logger.Error(err)
	}
	topics, err := client.Topics()
'''
new = '''func (input *kafkaInput) Test(ctx input.TestContext) error {
	client, err := sarama.NewClient(input.config.Hosts, input.saramaConfig)
	if err != nil {
		ctx.Logger.Error(err)
		return err
	}
	defer client.Close()
	topics, err := client.Topics()
'''
if old not in s:
    raise SystemExit('target text not found')
p.write_text(s.replace(old, new))
PY
